{{CargoOrgan
|name=Pulsed Mitochondria
|type=Common
|rank=blue
|id=10829
|idx=30
|description=Cells in powerful beings are hyperactive, their bioelectric currents stronger than average. When emotions spike, these organisms alter the very magnetic field around them…
|skill=
|hp=1034
|def=84
|atk=140
|rush=90
|gene1=Snail Arena, Water DMG +60
|gene2=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +1%
|gene3=Snail Arena, ELMT DMG REDUC +2%
|gene7=Snail Arena, paralysis RES +1% (Awakened)
|}}
